title: Chewy Croatian Knafeh Bake
description: A delightful, umami-packed Croatian-inspired dessert featuring knafeh in a crispy exterior, chewy interior, no onions, no garlic. Perfect for crowds without the hassle of traditional knafeh assembly.
instructions: Thaw the knafeh according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the butter, Greek yogurt, honey, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt.
Stir in the milk until the mixture is smooth.
Add the chopped walnuts and mix until they are evenly distributed.
Add the thawed knafeh and mix until the dough is evenly moistened.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Dip the dish into an ice bath to shock the knafeh and help it retain its chewiness.
Remove the dish from the ice bath and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
Drizzle with rose water and sprinkle with lemon zest before serving.
